zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Coucy於1366年4月出生在法國時，她的父親Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford26歲，母親Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford33歲。她和Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1405年3月3日享年38歲，埋葬在法國瑟。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Coucy于1366年4月出生在法国时，她的父亲Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford26岁，母亲Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford33岁。她和Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1405年3月3日享年38岁，埋葬在法国瑟。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Coucy was born in April 1366, in France, her father, Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford, was 26 and her mother, Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford, was 33. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson. She died on 3 March 1405, at the age of 38, and was buried in Seine, France.

fr.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Coucy est née en avril 1366, à France, son père, Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson. Elle est décédée le 3 mars 1405, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Seine, France.

de.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Coucy im April 1366 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford 26 und ihre Mutter Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford 33. Sie hatte mit Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. März 1405 im Alter von 38 Jahren und wurde in Seine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Coucy è nata il nel aprile 1366 nel Francia, sua padre, Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson. Morì il 3 marzo 1405, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Seine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Coucyが1366年4月にフランスで生まれた時，父Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedfordは26歳，母Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedfordは33歳であった。彼女はHenri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Moussonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1405年3月3日に38歳で死去し，フランスセアインにて埋葬された。

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Coucy(이)가 1366년 4월 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 3월 3일 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Coucy nasceu em abril de 1366, em França, seu pai, Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson. Ela faleceu em 3 de março de 1405, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Seine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Coucy родилась апрель 1366 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson. Она умерла 3 марта 1405 г. в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности син, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Coucy nació en abril de 1366, en Francia, su papá, Enguerrand VII de Coucy Comte de Soissons et d'Albemarle et Bedford, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel of Woodstock Countess of Bedford, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1405, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Seine, Francia.
